label: FACIS Simulation — Feeds
info:
FACIS Simulation — Feeds & Envelope Assembly

Receives a tick.trigger message via link-in, generates all feed snapshots
(weather, pv, meters, prices, consumers, smart-city), assembles the
unified envelope expected by the Kafka/MQTT/Modbus adapters, and emits
via link-out (`sim.envelope`).

Entity registry is statically defined in the function node — override
via flow context `entity_registry` (set by the Engine flow on startup
from /data/sim-config.json if present).

Physics is intentionally inlined here; the canonical per-simulator
implementations live in subflows/<name>-simulator.subflow.json and are
exercised by tests/flows/*.spec.js. The orchestrator must stay in sync
with those subflows.

name: feeds orchestrator
